detectors.description:
PendlePTAdapter.deposit(uint256) (src/adapters/PendlePTAdapter.sol#265-300) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- expPt = (usdeIn * 1e18) / rate (src/adapters/PendlePTAdapter.sol#278)
	- guess = ApproxParams({guessMin:0,guessMax:(expPt * (BPS + GUESS_MAX_PAD_BPS)) / BPS,guessOffchain:0,maxIteration:256,eps:1e14}) (src/adapters/PendlePTAdapter.sol#281-287)
detectors.markdown:
[PendlePTAdapter.deposit(uint256)](src/adapters/PendlePTAdapter.sol#L265-L300) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- [expPt = (usdeIn * 1e18) / rate](src/adapters/PendlePTAdapter.sol#L278)
	- [guess = ApproxParams({guessMin:0,guessMax:(expPt * (BPS + GUESS_MAX_PAD_BPS)) / BPS,guessOffchain:0,maxIteration:256,eps:1e14})](src/adapters/PendlePTAdapter.sol#L281-L287)

detectors.description:
PendlePTAdapter.withdraw(uint256,address) (src/adapters/PendlePTAdapter.sol#308-369) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- buffered = (targetFromPt * BPS) / (BPS - slippageBps) (src/adapters/PendlePTAdapter.sol#335)
	- ptToLiq = (ptBal * buffered) / ptMarkUsdc (src/adapters/PendlePTAdapter.sol#336)

detectors.description:
